goalStatement:
I want to govern the order pricing logic in src/pricing.ts of the 
codl-governance-test repository. The file exports a calculateOrderTotal 
function that computes order totals using the following rules: promo 
codes apply to the subtotal before tax, tax is calculated on the 
post-discount amount, shipping is free when the post-discount subtotal 
reaches $50 and otherwise costs $5.99. I want Codl to detect any drift 
between this governance spec and the implementation on future PRs.
